preamble: Affrication and devoicing of the voiced postalveolar fricative [ʒ] to the voiceless postalveolar affricate [tʃ].

examples.note: Transition involving the addition of a stop onset and loss of voicing.

sources: Ladefoged, P., & Maddieson, I. (1996). The Sounds of the World's Languages.
Schenker, A. M. (1995). The Dawn of Slavic.
